name: io.github.alex-gon/thegamecrafter
description: Design, manage, and price tabletop games on The Game Crafter via MCP.
title: The Game Crafter

environmentVariables.name: TGC_API_KEY_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your TGC API key ID (optional if providing credentials via authenticate tool)

environmentVariables.name: TGC_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Your TGC account username (optional if providing credentials via authenticate tool)

environmentVariables.name: TGC_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Your TGC account password (optional if providing credentials via authenticate tool)

environmentVariables.name: TGC_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the TGC API base URL

environmentVariables.name: TGC_UPLOAD_BASE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Restrict file uploads to a specific directory
